sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n45387" key="eu)u/popta" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">εὐύποπτα</orth> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">σώματα</foreign> persons <sense id="n45387.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">believed to be dangerously ill</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0718.tlg005:78" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aët.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5.78</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
